title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at COSCO India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at COSCO India
jsonLd.description:
Join the COSCO India family as a Logistics Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About COSCO India:
COSCO India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with COSCO India!
